content: Hello! Welcome to my website. How can I assist you today?
what does he know about HCX

HCX, or Hybrid Cloud Extension, is a VMware product that facilitates the migration of applications to the cloud. It allows users to seamlessly move workloads between on-premises data centers and various cloud environments without significant reconfiguration or downtime. 

My experience with HCX includes using it during migrations of large government applications into secure hybrid cloud platforms. I’ve been involved in developing scripts that support the migration process and address associated challenges, particularly around storage and downtime management. If you have specific questions about HCX or related technologies, feel free to ask!
has he done a udemy course for HCX - dates? completion ?

I haven't specifically taken a Udemy course focused solely on HCX. However, I have engaged in various courses related to cloud technologies as part of my professional development. My training and practical experience in hybrid cloud environments have primarily come through hands-on work on projects.

If you're interested in my training related to cloud technologies or other areas, I can certainly share more general information!
Hello again! How can I help you today?
